creator: stefan.witzel@zvw.uni-goettingen.de
text:
Created attachment 152011
Console output

The command sysctl -a causes system to panic. The problem occurs for root and and unprivileged users.

Steps to reproduce:
Reboot system and run sysctl -a.

Actual results:
see attached screenshot

OS:
FreeBSD pollux 10.1-RELEASE-p4 FreeBSD 10.1-RELEASE-p4 #3 r277486: Thu Jan 22 07:44:45 CET 2015     witzel@pollux:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/pollux-1.x  i386
